# zstack_access_control_list (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage Access Control Lists (ACLs) in ZStack. An ACL is used to control access to network resources based on IP addresses.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the Access Control List.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the Access Control List.
- `ip_version` (Number) The IP version (4 for IPv4, 6 for IPv6).

### Read-Only

- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the Access Control List.
